sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Benfica are in excellent form, remaining unbeaten in their last 5 matches with 3 wins and 2 draws, showcasing strong attacking output with 11 goals scored. Estoril Praia have had a mixed run, securing 2 wins, 1 draw, and 2 losses in their last 5, with a notable defensive struggle conceding 9 goals in that span.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two encounters, Benfica have dominated Estoril Praia, winning both matches with a combined score of 5-1. Benfica have also won all of their last 5 head-to-head matchups, often scoring early and maintaining control.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Benfica, sitting 3rd in the league with 36 points, boast a strong offense (33 goals) and a solid defense (10 conceded), ranking high in possession and duel-winning stats. Estoril Praia, positioned 9th with 20 points, have scored 27 goals but struggle defensively with 26 conceded, often vulnerable against top sides.

sections.subtitle: Key Players to Watch
sections.text: Benfica's Vangelis Pavlidis has been in fine form, scoring 4 goals in the last 5 matches, while Nicolás Otamendi provides defensive stability. For Estoril, Jordan Holsgrove stands out with a high Sofascore rating, contributing both goals and assists recently.

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: Given Benfica's superior form, head-to-head dominance, and statistical edge, they are heavily favored to win at Estádio da Luz. Estoril's defensive frailties could be exploited by Benfica's potent attack, though they might find chances on the counter.
